puzzles.description: Player finds 3 numbers in 3 different locations and uses those numbers to unlock a vault.

customCommands.description: Checks if an item can be written on (hard coded list). If it can, either write what the user said to write or describe some vague writing. Example: user input: "Write on the tablet." Game response: "Scribble scribble. You write on the tablet." Another example: User input: "Write 'hello' on the paper." (game state updated to have 'hello' on the paper) Response: "'hello' is now on the paper"

overrideCommands.description: When the user punches the punching bag scenery object, this occurs: the punching bag swings out then swings back and knocks the player down. It also pops open and spews foam, along with a note. So these parts of the game state are updated: location description, punching bag scenery object, and location items.

hints.condition: the player hasn't unlocked the chest yet but they have the key.
messages: Take a look at your inventory. That key is useful for something.
Use the key to unlock the chest in the basement.
